title: Join reorder might put the filters to the wrong place
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t5(a int, b varchar(10), c float, d date);
CREATE TABLE t6(a int, b int, c int DEFAULT 0 CHECK (c >= 0));
SELECT * FROM t5 LEFT JOIN t6 ON t5.a = t6.a WHERE (t5.b = 'test' OR t6.c IS NULL);
key_bug_features: Join reorder misplaces filter conditions in query execution
